programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep33
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Men in Love Ep01
programme.desc: Magazine editor Ye Han, PE teacher Li Xiao Xiao, magazine publisher Xu Jia Cheng and former top model Tong Yi Wen navigate love and career challenges, finding happiness amid ups and downs.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep16
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep17
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep18
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: Live Up To Your Youth Ep10
programme.desc: A group of youngsters arrives in Beijing, chasing careers in writing & music. Living in a cramped basement, they face real-life struggles in pursuit of their dreams.

programme.title: Live Up To Your Youth Ep11
programme.desc: A group of youngsters arrives in Beijing, chasing careers in writing & music. Living in a cramped basement, they face real-life struggles in pursuit of their dreams.

programme.title: Golden Trio Ep06
programme.desc: Three old friends with different personalities come together after a lifetime of hard work. In retirement, they overcome personal challenges and face the second half of their lives head-on.

programme.title: Golden Trio Ep07
programme.desc: Three old friends with different personalities come together after a lifetime of hard work. In retirement, they overcome personal challenges and face the second half of their lives head-on.

programme.title: Wild Agent 2: Peach Assassination
programme.desc: To invade the global financial system, a criminal organization kidnaps AI expert Fang Li. His wife, Ya Mei, a retired former ATO agent, rejoins the organization to rescue her husband.

programme.title: Green Snake
programme.desc: Green Snake, who does not eat humans but only demons, is attacked and driven away after a misunderstanding. After her escape, she meets Little Ghost & they forge a friendship as they travelled.

programme.title: Mrs. Golden Snake
programme.desc: The Sword Sect faces Lady Golden Snake's revival after her seal breaks. Demon Qu Ling and disciple Bian Xiaoya unite to reclaim the sword and seal her.

programme.title: Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Zhao Da Chun is a well-known local psychic who privately joined forces with his younger brother to help fortune tellers solve practical problems, leading to many amusing situations.

programme.title: Guardian Of Graveyard
programme.desc: Treasure hunters Xun Ye, Feng Yao, Cai Qing Yun, Wang Ya Zi & others encounter various dangers as they seek treasure at Qinling Phoenix Mountain, even averting conspiracies & diplomatic issues.

programme.title: Mi Wu Ci Sha
programme.desc: The daughter of a late great general embarks on a journey for revenge when she discovers that the mastermind to the murder of her biological father is her foster father, the Prime Minister.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep15
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep16
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: Lost Destiny
programme.desc: While journeying to take the imperial exam, scholar Pu Song Ling meets Su Xian, a nine-tailed fox spirit indebted to his kindness in their previous life.

programme.title: Drug Storm
programme.desc: Vice-captain Xiao Ruolan falls into a trap at the border. Her substitute joins the police to fight Chen Qiang. Real vs fake, bullets fly—who will survive and have the last laugh?

programme.title: Blade Of Fury
programme.desc: Pei Xing is famous for being an 'unkillable' & cold-blooded assassin. But after witnessing great injustice, his dormant chivalry gradually awakens and he decides to retaliate in kind.

programme.title: Second Life
programme.desc: Years ago, a little boy is born in prison and his mother was forced to give him up, losing all contact with him. When she is released, she tries her best to make amends to rebuild their relationship.

programme.title: Monstert Of Er Long Lake
programme.desc: Yu Huan wants to marry his childhood sweetheart Xiao Yu but is stopped by a huge bride price. With three goofy friends, he tries to raise money but accidentally awakens a century-old lake monster.

programme.title: Huang Jin Gui Shi Lu Film Series
programme.desc: With the influential sects at the brink of war, County Chief Lu instructs Chief Detective Duan Guang Long & siblings, Xue Xiao Feng & Xue Xiao Hua, to conduct a secret investigation on the matter.

programme.title: Salt Lake Project
programme.desc: A fool searching for his missing lover unexpectedly encounters a rogue who has lost himself. With an old, broken truck, they embark on a journey filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden Trio Ep08
programme.desc: Three old friends with different personalities come together after a lifetime of hard work. In retirement, they overcome personal challenges and face the second half of their lives head-on.

programme.title: Golden Trio Ep09
programme.desc: Three old friends with different personalities come together after a lifetime of hard work. In retirement, they overcome personal challenges and face the second half of their lives head-on.

programme.title: Desert Lone Hero
programme.desc: The fight for a mystical treasure begins after the death of Shen Shijie, the world's richest businessman, who built an impenetrable vault to seal up his huge wealth.

programme.title: The Legend Of Feng Lou: Divine Fox
programme.desc: The grandfather of a human girl is killed after offending a fox fairy in the mountains. Years later, the girl marries Feng Lou, the murderer who killed her grandfather, in an attempt to take revenge.

programme.title: Haunted Xiangxi
programme.desc: When a Feng Shui master unexpectedly falls into a trap set by the cunning Gold Old Monster, he is coerced into exploring the ancient tombs of Xiangxi for the monster's nefarious purpose.

programme.title: Peak Confrontation
programme.desc: Gangster Chu Tian Kuo involuntarily participates in a competition to win the golden mask. But during the struggle for the mask, he is framed & subsequently rescued by the princess of a foreign tribe.

programme.title: Shell Girl
programme.desc: Upon waking up in a laboratory, a girl finds that she has gained superior fighting skills but lost her memory. Hunted by an unknown man, she has to save herself & rediscover her identity.

programme.title: The Chi Dragon Slash
programme.desc: At the end of the Tang Dynasty, Navy General Qian Liu set off to exterminate the river pirates, only to discover a mystical two-headed beast called the Chi dragon in a cave.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep17
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep18
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: The King Rise Again
programme.desc: During the struggle for the dragon throne, the Empress reveals that the Emperor has a hidden son. She appoints Man Shu to find the one who would be the true heir to the throne.

programme.title: Twin Serpents: Demon Drive
programme.desc: Twin Serpents: Demon Drive

programme.title: Shuigui Bride
programme.desc: On a stormy night, 8 people gather in a dilapidated temple to take shelter from the rain. They begin discussing the legend of the Water Ghost Bride, kick-starting a series of mysterious murders.

programme.title: Special Monster
programme.desc: Gao Cheng set sail in search of an ancient ship carrying countless treasures that mysteriously vanished, only to end up on a mysterious island inhabited by a primitive tribe & alien creatures.

programme.title: The Drunken Prodigy
programme.desc: A spoiled young man with a passion for martial arts loses his entire fortune when he falls victim to a series of traps set by malicious gang while pursuing the top courtesan.
